title: Recorded Future Sandbox
content:
Template playbook utilizing Hatching.io to sandbox a given file and generate an analysis report. Indicators from the given report are then extracted and enriched with Recorded Future data.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Recorded Future pack (RecordedFuture, partner-supported).

Inputs — File.

Outputs — DBotScore: The DBotScore object.; DBotScore.Indicator: Triage analysis target; DBotScore.Type: The indicator type - File or URL; DBotScore.Vendor: The integration used to generate the indicator; DBotScore.Score: Analysis verdict as score from 1 to 10.

Integrations/scripts used: Hatching Triage, Recorded Future v2.

    type: playbook
    task:
      id: b990d9d0-9cde-43ce-87ef-cc39e0468ff7
      version: -1
      name: GenericPolling
      description: |-
        Use this playbook as a sub-playbook to block execution of the master playbook until a remote action is complete.
        This playbook implements polling by continuously running the command in Step \#2 until the operation completes.
        The remote action should have the following structure:

        1. Initiate the operation.
        2. Poll to check if the operation completed.
        3. (optional) Get the results of the operation.
      playbookName: GenericPolling
      type: playbook
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""
    nexttasks:
      '#none#':
        - "22"
    scriptarguments:
      Ids:
        simple: ${Triage.submissions.id}
      Interval:
        simple: "1"
      PollingCommandArgName:
        simple: sample_id
      PollingCommandName:
        simple: triage-get-sample-summary
      Timeout:
        simple: "5"
      dt:
        simple: Triage.sample-summaries(val.status!=='reported').sample
    separatecontext: true
    loop:
      iscommand: false
      exitCondition: ""
      wait: 1
      max: 0
